GB/T 39928一2021
3.5
displacement factor
cosine of the phase-angle between the fundamental wave of the supply voltage and the fundamental
wave of the Supply current
NOTE 1 Represented by cosy，
NOTE 2 ”The displacement factor is explained in Annex F of GB/T 24823一2017.
NOTE 3 ”Rewrite GB/T 24833一2017，definition 3.19.
3.6
lumen maintenance
for alight source operated at the specified condition , the ratio of the Iluminous flux emitted at a giv-
en time in the life to the initial Iluminous flux
NOTE “The ratio is usually expressed as a percentage.
[GB/T 24826一2016 ,definition 3.28]
3.7
color drift
the difference between the initial color and the color of the lamp at a given time during its life while
the lamp operating at specified conditions
NOTE It can be expressed as the color difference Au'v' of the average color of the lamp or of the point under the lamp，
with specified distance in CIE 1976 (由 ,v“) uniform chromaticity space.
3.8
early failure
the failure of the lamp during the aging process of 1 000 h,， such as no light, visible flicker or obvious
decrease of Iluminous flux ，etc.
NOTE Rewrite GB/T 36949一2018，definition 3.3.
3.9
average life
number of operating hours elapsed at which point 50% of a representative group of lamps whose lu-
men maintenance decreases to 70% during life test
4
